$comment: Recorded responses from kitsu.io/api/edge. Refresh via `make fixtures-refresh` once that target lands; until then re-curl with the request snippets below.

search_one_piece.json.notes: 5 hits, including anime/13623 with coverImage:null — exercises the null-cover branch in parse_search_response.

anime_one_piece_detail.json.notes: Single-resource response with full posterImage+coverImage, used as the canonical detail-page golden.

anime_null_cover_detail.json.notes: Crayon Shin-chan — currently airing, coverImage:null. Exercises the detail-page banner-fallback branch.
